cast.name: 尤奥扎斯·布德赖蒂斯 Juozas Budraitis
柳博米拉斯·劳恰维丘斯 Liubomiras Lauciavicius
莱玛·阿克斯蒂奈特 Laima Akstinaite
埃格勒·米库利翁尼特 Egle Mikulionyte

introduction: The story follows Malvina, a former ballerina in her mid-eighties once celebrated for her gracefulness on stage, but who now languishes in a monotonous routine. After she unexpectedly meets Kipras, a talented painter of her age, he becomes the catalyst for change. Together, they defy society’s expectations about seniors, transcending age and challenging taboos. As they escape from relatives and institutions, they discover that freedom isn’t merely physical; it’s about breaking free from invisible chains. Their journey unfolds as a pas de deux – a dance of resilience, rebellion and redemption. Can love overcome loneliness, and can two ageing hearts rewrite their own ending?
